name: Workers comp vs suing for slip at work in Boise—which is better?
description: Comp for sure benefits; sue third party for extras if possible.[1]

mainEntity.name: Workers comp vs suing for slip at work in Boise—which is better?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for sure benefits; sue third party for extras if possible.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp is faster, no-fault benefits; suing only viable against third parties for fuller damages.** Comp lacks pain/suffering; suits risk loss if fault >50%.[1][6] Comp: guaranteed medical/wages; suit: higher potential but 2-year limit. Most choose comp first. Lawyer evaluates both paths.
